title: Senior Pricing Analyst, Product Operations (Global Pricing)
required_skills: Unit economics (CAC, LTV, GPO, Contribution Margin)
3+ years Product/Pricing Analyst in marketplace or e-commerce
bonus_skills: Stakeholder management with Marketing & Regional Ops
matched_skills: E-commerce & campaign ROI analytics (partial match for marketplace experience)
missing_skills: Unit economics (CAC, LTV, GPO, Contribution Margin)
core_responsibilities: Build predictive models to estimate feature impact (MOV adjustments, service fees) on GPO, Conversion Rate, and Order Frequency
Lead A/B testing and rollout analysis for new pricing features; identify value leakage and recommend pivots
Partner with Global Marketing and Regional Ops to translate business visions into product requirements
Monitor global fee structure health and answer pricing strategy best-practice questions
Own data visualizations in Tableau/BigQuery and maintain the Value Tracker aggregating incremental revenue across regions
recommended_emphasis: Highlight any SQL or database querying experience, even basic, if applicable
Emphasize A/B testing and experiment design experience prominently
Stress e-commerce funnel and conversion analytics background
Showcase data storytelling for senior stakeholders as a differentiator
Note: strong technical skill gap (SQL/BigQuery/Python) makes this role a low-match; consider deprioritizing

company_info.size_raw: operates in around 65 countries; listed on Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017, part of the MDAX — no explicit employee count found in JD text; match_score=24 below threshold for LinkedIn lookup
